title: Clearwater Trust — 2026 Annual Report
body: Clean water access for rural communities
Fiscal Year 2026 · Prepared for donors and board

title: Our Mission
body: Clearwater Trust builds and maintains clean water infrastructure in underserved rural regions
We believe access to clean water is a human right, not a privilege
Founded 2011 — 15 years of continuous field operations
Operating in 4 countries: Kenya, Tanzania, Malawi, Mozambique

title: 2026 By the Numbers
body: Total donations raised: $4.2M (+18% vs 2025)
Active volunteers: 1,340 across 4 countries
Wells constructed: 87 new wells this year
People served: 210,000 with new or improved water access
Program cost ratio: 84% of funds go directly to programs

title: Program Highlights
body: Launched rapid-response well repair program — average repair time cut from 6 weeks to 9 days
Expanded girls' school hydration stations to 40 new schools
Piloted solar-powered pump stations in 12 villages, reducing maintenance cost 60%
Trained 210 local technicians for long-term self-sufficient maintenance
Partnered with 3 regional governments on water-policy advocacy

title: Financial Breakdown
body: Program services: 84% of total spending ($3.53M)
Fundraising costs: 9% of total spending ($378K)
Administrative overhead: 7% of total spending ($294K)
Revenue sources: individual donors 52%, foundation grants 31%, corporate partners 17%

title: Donor & Community Voices
body: "Seeing the well go live in Kilifi was the proudest moment of my giving career — clean water changed that village overnight." — Margaret Ho, monthly donor since 2019
"Clearwater didn't just build a well, they trained our own people to keep it running for the next 50 years." — Village Chief Amara Kessy, Tanzania
"Their financial transparency is why our foundation renewed for a third consecutive year." — Daniel Reyes, Foundation Program Officer

title: 2027 Goals
body: Construct 110 new wells — 26% increase over 2026
Expand into a 5th country: Uganda pilot program
Grow solar-pump deployment to 50 villages
Increase local technician training program to 350 graduates
Raise $5.5M — a 31% funding increase to support expansion

title: Thank You & How to Help
body: Every $25 provides clean water access for one person for a full year
Volunteer opportunities open in all 4 country programs
Corporate matching programs available — contact our partnerships team
Board of Directors and full financial audit available at clearwatertrust.org/reports
